chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory on the Muhrim for the Various Types of Game He Injures

text: 2733 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يُصِيبُ اَلصَّيْدَ فَيَفْدِيهِ يَطْعَمُهُ أَوْ يَطْرَحُهُ قَالَ «إِذاً يَكُونَ عَلَيْهِ فِدَاءٌ آخَرُ» قِيلَ فَأَيَّ شَيْءٍ يَصْنَعُ بِهِ قَالَ «يَدْفِنُهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2733 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a person in the state of ihram who hunts game and pays its expiation: Should they eat it or discard it?
Imam (as) said: "If they eat it, then another expiation becomes obligatory upon them."
They asked: "What should they do with it then?"
Imam (as) replied: "They should bury it."
